prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily log returns for TMO over the past 2 years (from 2022-06-03 to 2024-06-03) were used to estimate the average daily drift (0.000494) and daily volatility (0.012582). The point estimate represents the expected price after 20 days, calculated as S_0 * exp(mu_daily * T). Confidence intervals are derived by assuming the logarithm of the future price is normally distributed according to the GBM model, then exponentiating the interval bounds to obtain price ranges. This method assumes past performance is indicative of future movements and market efficiency.
